meaning: n.[医](尤指使用电击方法的) 去心脏纤颤
examples: The shockable rhythms are treated with CPR and defibrillation.
These call for defibrillation as soon as possible.
Electrical defibrillation is the most effective method to treat the ventricular fibrillation (VF).
The technology reads the ECG and establishes the underlying rhythm and the need for defibrillation.
This procedure is sometimes appropriate in patients no longer needing or desiring defibrillation backup at battery depletion but still having pacing indications.
